title: acer platanoides var. stollii
intro: Acer platanoides var. stollii, also known as the Stolli's maple, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Sapindaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Stolli's maple include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stolli's maple include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
